text: We saw it suddenly just started to really rise a lot, and we knew then that we had to leave. Yeah, that's pretty hard for me to see it, Filsy, and yeah, just see it wrecked. We've always looked after our things, so it's really horrible. When they do get access to their homes, they're full of mould, toxic smells. So completely heartbreaking when you when you see that happen. Now, if they're part of RACQ, they're covered. It can be replaced. It will be fixed. You don't need to worry about that.
